description_long: This is a wooden minecart-style handcart with a rectangular, open-topped receptacle mounted on four black metal wheels. The cart features reinforced metal bands and rivets along its vertical edges, providing structural support and a rugged industrial look. Inside the cart, there are mining tools such as a pickaxe and a shovel, suggesting its use for transporting materials or tools. The handcart sits on a short section of metal rails, with some broken wooden planks visible beneath. The wood is a medium brown color, while the metal components are dark gray to black, giving the cart a utilitarian, robust appearance. The overall design is functional, with no visible handles, and the interior is spacious enough to carry a moderate load.
description: A rugged wooden minecart-style handcart with metal wheels, reinforced corners, and mining tools inside, set on short metal rails. The cart is open-topped and built for transporting materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reinforced metal band and rivets, with mining tools visible inside the open cart.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular wooden body, metal wheels, and the mining tools resting inside.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with a clear view of the open interior and the broken wooden planks on the rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shovel hanging over the edge and the overall boxy structure of the cart.
